  <rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="#f6f7f9" />

    <linearGradient id="handleGrad" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#ff8a65" />

    <linearGradient id="shaftGrad" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="0">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#e6e6e6" />

    <!-- handle highlight -->
    <ellipse cx="270" cy="35" rx="50" ry="16" fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.12" />

    <g fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.14">

    <!-- butt end shading -->
    <ellipse cx="295" cy="65" rx="38" ry="22" fill="#000" opacity="0.08" />
  </g>
</svg>

  <ellipse cx="256" cy="440" rx="160" ry="26" fill="#000" opacity="0.06" />

  <g transform="translate(60,420) rotate(-35)">

    <rect x="-20" y="46" width="260" height="20" rx="4" fill="url(#shaftGrad)" stroke="#6b6b6b" stroke-width="3" />

    <polygon points="-40,46 -40,66 -12,56" fill="#7b7b7b" stroke="#4b4b4b" stroke-width="2" />

    <rect x="-32" y="52" width="24" height="6" rx="2" fill="#2d2d2d" opacity="0.95" />

    <rect x="200" y="10" width="170" height="90" rx="28" fill="url(#handleGrad)" stroke="#5a1f1f" stroke-width="4" />
    <!-- handle highlight -->
    <ellipse cx="270" cy="35" rx="50" ry="16" fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.12" />

    <g fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.14">

    <ellipse cx="295" cy="65" rx="38" ry="22" fill="#000" opacity="0.08" />
  </g>
</svg>"
